prompt:
Ultra-realistic 16:9 close-up scan of a United States citizenship card placed on a clean light grey/white background. The card is horizontally aligned, centered in frame, captured with sharp focus and professional studio lighting.
The design features an official government-style layout with clean typography and advanced security elements. Top section includes the header: “UNITED STATES OF AMERICA” and “CERTIFICATE OF CITIZENSHIP / IDENTITY CARD.” A subtle American flag motif appears in the background with red and blue gradient overlays.
The card includes a passport-style portrait of a young adult woman: shoulder-length soft wavy dark brown hair, warm neutral skin tone, light natural freckles, hazel eyes, minimal makeup, neutral expression, direct gaze, wearing a simple black top and small gold stud earrings.
Personal details displayed clearly:
– Surname: JOHNSON
– Given Name: EMMA GRACE
– Date of Birth: 09 AUG 1997
– Place of Birth: LOS ANGELES, CALIFORNIA, USA
– Citizenship Number: USC-8492-7731
– Date of Issue: 12 JAN 2025
– Date of Expiry: 12 JAN 2035
– Nationality: UNITED STATES
Security and design features include:
– Fine guilloche patterns across the entire surface
– Microprinted text and line engravings
– A semi-transparent holographic bald eagle emblem on the right side
– Embedded hologram seal with stars and shield motif
– Subtle Statue of Liberty illustration blended into the background
– Signature at the bottom: “Emma G. Johnson”
Additional elements:
– Department of Homeland Security emblem in the top corner
– Barcode or ID strip along the bottom edge
– Red, white, and blue gradient accents
Lighting is soft and evenly diffused, highlighting laminated plastic texture, subtle reflections, and holographic security overlays. No hand visible. Clean, minimal, professional composition. Ultra-detailed, photorealistic, 8K quality.
